transport = ssh.get_transport\(\)

channel = transport.open_session\(\)

channel.exec_command\('cd /var/www/avtosalon/backend && npm run build 2>&1 && echo BUILD_SUCCESS'\)

ssh.close\(\)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import paramiko, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('5.189.141.151', username='root', password='P3h2c5t4F', timeout=15\)
transport = ssh.get_transport\(\)
transport.set_keepalive\(15\)
channel = transport.open_session\(\)
channel.set_combine_stderr\(True\)
channel.settimeout\(300\)
channel.exec_command\('cd /var/www/avtosalon && git pull origin main 2>&1 && cd backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && pm2 restart avtosalon-api 2>&1 && echo DEPLOY_DONE'\)
output = b''
while True:
    try:
        chunk = channel.recv\(4096\)
        if not chunk: break
        output += chunk
    except: break
text = output.decode\('utf-8'\)
print\(text[-2000:]\)
ssh.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
